    D

    DataManager - Class in model.util
    Used to save and load files in the data folder

    destruction() - Method in class model.entity.enemy.entities.Ball
    Destroys the ball
    Detectable - Class in model.entity.detectable
    Detectable is a type of Entity that other than having the normal hitbox, it also has the dtcbox (detectbox), used to check if certain Entity is within it's dtcbox.
    Detectable(float, float, int, int) - Constructor for class model.entity.detectable.Detectable
    Detectable constructor that set the placement and the size
    directionalIsPathFree(Rectangle2D.Float, float, boolean, int[][], Optional) - Static method in class model.util.MapReader
    Checks if the path is free towards that direction
    disableRobots() - Method in class model.level.Room
    Terminal DISABLE ROBOTS
    disableRobots() - Method in class model.Play
    Terminal DISABLE ROBOTS
    drawAllEntities(Play, Graphics2D) - Static method in class view.util.play.RenderPlay
    Draw all the entities (includes the player)
    DRAWER - Enum constant in enum class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture.FurnitureTypes
     
    drawHud(Play, Graphics2D) - Static method in class view.util.play.RenderPlay
    HUD
    drawLevel(Play, Graphics2D) - Static method in class view.util.play.RenderPlay
    Draw the current level
    drawOuterStuff(Play, Graphics2D) - Static method in class view.util.play.RenderPlay
    Draw all the stuff that shows in front of everything else (the elevator and the notification box)
